resources.string: 1 digit is correct and in the right spot
1 digit is correct but in the wrong spot
2 digits are correct, 1 is in the right spot
2 digits are correct, 1 is in the right spot
2 digits are correct, both in right spots
1 digit is correct and in the right spot
1 digit is correct but in the wrong spot
2 digits are correct, both in wrong spots
2 digits are correct, both in wrong spots
2 digits are correct, 1 is in the right spot
You can do better! Try again!

string-array.name: game_quotes
string-array.item: "When you eliminate the impossible, whatever remains must be the truth." – Sherlock Holmes
"It is a capital mistake to theorize before one has data." – Sherlock Holmes
"The world is full of obvious things which nobody ever observes." – Sherlock Holmes
"There is nothing more deceptive than an obvious fact." – Sherlock Holmes
"The little things are infinitely the most important." – Sherlock Holmes
"You see, but you do not observe. The distinction is clear." – Sherlock Holmes
"I never guess. It is destructive to the logical faculty." – Sherlock Holmes
"Data! Data! Data! I can\\'t make bricks without clay." – Sherlock Holmes
"The game is afoot!" – Sherlock Holmes
"Education never ends. It is a series of lessons, with the greatest for the last." – Sherlock Holmes
"It is the brain, the little grey cells, on which one must rely." – Hercule Poirot
"The impossible could not have happened. Therefore the impossible must be possible." – Hercule Poirot
"Instinct is a marvelous thing. It can neither be explained nor ignored." – Agatha Christie
"Every case is a puzzle. Fit the pieces and the picture appears." – Agatha Christie
"The truth, however ugly, is always better than a beautiful lie." – Agatha Christie
"Logic is the beginning of wisdom, not the end." – Leonard Nimoy
"The measure of intelligence is the ability to change." – Albert Einstein
"Numbers are the highest degree of knowledge." – Plato
"Every code is created to be broken — eventually."
"A detective is only as good as the clues he refuses to ignore."
"The cipher always speaks. You just need to learn its language."
"Patience cracks every vault. Haste triggers every alarm."
"Every wrong answer eliminates a possibility. That is progress."
"Trust the pattern. The numbers never lie."
"A sharp mind sees order where others see chaos."

resources.string: I scored %1$d points in Number Detective! Used %2$d attempts in %3$s. Can you beat my score? 🎮
Examine hints to track down the secret code.
Use logic to eliminate impossible numbers.
Enter the correct sequence and win!

When time runs out, the evidence will be destroyed. To solve the case, you must crack the 3-layer cipher before the evidence disappears. Don\'t panic! All digits in the secret code are unique, which will narrow down your deductions and make decoding easier.
Use the vertical cylinders to select your digits. Drag or tap them to reveal the combination you wish to test.
Stuck? Tap the top-right \'Attempts\' counter at any time to open your Case Archive. Here you can review all your previous guesses and narrow down the possibilities.

If you enable Assistance Mode from Settings, you will see color-coded feedback for your guesses in the archive:

• GREEN: Correct digit in right spot.
• YELLOW: Correct digit in wrong spot.
Cracking a layer grants you extra attempt rights and adds more time to the clock. Clear all 3 layers to win the case.

Skilled detectives earn extra points for efficiency:

• SHARP DEDUCTION (+500): Solve in 2 or fewer attempts.
• FLASH CLEARANCE (+300): Solve in under 20 seconds.

Every assist reduces your score, but your total never drops below zero:

• ARCHIVE CHECK: -50 Points
• ASSISTED MODE: -150 Points per check in the log.

This game was created without any commercial purpose — a gift to humanity. Its mission: to fight the attention deficit and brain rot fuelled by social media by training short-term memory, strengthening analytical intelligence, and sharpening focus and concentration.

There are no ads in this game. The reason is simple: ads are one of the very triggers of brain rot.

If you enjoyed the game, you can buy me a coffee ☕
This combination has already been tried. Try a different sequence. (No points or attempts deducted)
All digits in the code must be unique. Review your sequence. (No points or attempts deducted)
Enables color-coded logic feedback for each digit in the interrogation log.
Level %1$d reached. You gained %2$d extra attempts and %3$d bonus seconds. Ready for the next phase?
Wrong sequence! Security is tightening. You have %d attempts remaining.
The countdown has been halted. Your current intelligence is preserved.
